relationship_disposition.notes: The proposal includes primary-source references and a plausible overlap claim, but glossary mutation is deferred until a fuller review decides whether and how to phrase the overlap.
The adjacent relationship appears plausible but is not accepted into glossary text by this decision.

rejected_text: NIST AI RMF governance language is equivalent to Governance Boundary.
decision_basis: NIST AI RMF is a primary government reference for AI risk management and trustworthiness considerations.
The proposal identifies overlap with structured AI governance and risk-management responsibilities.

The proposal also identifies mismatches: NIST AI RMF does not encode Site/Wiki/Continuity/StegCore role separation, does not mint a StegVerse decision receipt, and does not by itself determine commit-time admissibility.
The safe disposition is to defer glossary mutation while preserving the proposal as a researched relationship candidate.
non_claims: DEFER_PENDING_REVIEW does not accept NIST AI RMF as equivalent to Governance Boundary.
DEFER_PENDING_REVIEW does not claim NIST endorsement of StegVerse terminology.
DEFER_PENDING_REVIEW does not update glossary text.
DEFER_PENDING_REVIEW does not create admissibility standing.
